```{r figure 065}
df_065 <- read_fig("fig_065") %>%
  rename(Year = 1, Share = 2) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Year)) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric),
         Share = Share * 100)

fig_065 <- ggplot(df_065, aes(Year, Share)) +
  geom_col(fill = tpa_colors[2], width = 0.7, alpha = ALPHA_COL) +
  geom_text(aes(label = fmt_pct_0(Share)),
            vjust = -0.5,
            color = tpa_colors[2],
            size = DATA_LABEL_SIZE / .pt,
            fontface = "bold",
            family = FONT_FAMILY) +
  scale_x_years(df_065$Year, by = 1) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number(suffix = "%"),
                     limits = c(60, 80),
                     breaks = seq(60, 80, 2),
                     expand = EXPAND_TIGHT_TOP,
                     oob = scales::oob_keep) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(60, 80)) +
  labs_meta(meta, y = "Intention to stay in the United States") +
  theme_tpa()

save_chart(fig_065, "fig_065")
```

# Figure 66 - Share of ‘Staying’ Responses on Intention to Stay After Receipt of Doctorate Among Temporary Visa Holder Recipients, by World Region
```{r figure 066}
meta <- get_meta("fig_066")
df   <- read_country_lines("fig_066", group_col = "Region", value_col = "Share") %>%
  filter(Region != "Region and country or economy unknown") %>%
  mutate(Share = Share * 100)
fig  <- plot_country_lines(df, meta, "Stay rate after doctorate",
                           group_col = "Region",
                           value_col = "Share",
                           label_fmt = fmt_pct_0,
                           pad_right = PAD_RIGHT_STANDARD,
                           y_args    = list(
                             labels = label_number(suffix = "%"),
                             limits = c(40, 90),
                             breaks = seq(40, 90, 10),
                             expand = EXPAND_BAR_TIGHT
                           ))
save_chart(fig, "fig_066")
```

# Figure 67 - International STEM PhD Recipients – Stay Rates
```{r figure 067}
meta <- get_meta("fig_067")

df_067 <- read_fig("fig_067") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Year)) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Year, names_to = "Rate", values_to = "Share") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Share)) %>%
  mutate(
    Share = Share * 100,
    Rate  = factor(Rate, levels = c("5-year stay rate", "10-year stay rate"))
  )

palette_067 <- c(
  "5-year stay rate"  = tpa_colors[2],   # navy
  "10-year stay rate" = tpa_colors[1]    # red
)

fig_067 <- ggplot(df_067, aes(Year, Share, color = Rate, group = Rate)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = LINE_WIDTH) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_text(aes(label = fmt_pct_1(Share)),
            vjust = -1.1,
            size = DATA_LABEL_SIZE / .pt,
            fontface = "bold",
            family = FONT_FAMILY,
            show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_x_years(df_067$Year, by = 2) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number(suffix = "%"),
                     limits = c(50, 75),
                     breaks = seq(50, 75, 5),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) +
  scale_color_manual(values = palette_067) +
  labs_meta(meta, y = "Stay rate") +
  theme_tpa() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5))

save_chart(fig_067, "fig_067")
```

# Figure 68 - Distribution of Postgraduation Plans After Receipt of Doctorate Among Science and Engineering Research Doctorate Recipients, by Broad Major Field (2023)
```{r figure 068}
meta <- get_meta("fig_068")

field_order <- c(
  "Agricultural sciences and natural resources",
  "Biological and biomedical sciences",
  "Computer and information sciences",
  "Engineering",
  "Geosciences, atmospheric, and ocean sciences",
  "Health sciences",
  "Mathematics and statistics",
  "Multidisciplinary/ interdisciplinary sciences",
  "Physical sciences",
  "Psychology",
  "Social sciences",
  "Non-science and engineering"
)

df_068 <- read_fig("fig_068") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Year)) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Year, names_to = "Field", values_to = "Share") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Share)) %>%
  mutate(
    Share = Share * 100,
    Field = factor(Field, levels = field_order),
    Year  = factor(Year)
  )

palette_068 <- c(
  "2021" = tpa_colors[2],   # navy
  "2022" = tpa_colors[1],   # red
  "2023" = tpa_colors[4],   # green
  "2024" = tpa_colors[5]    # purple
)

fig_068 <- ggplot(df_068, aes(Field, Share, fill = Year)) +
  geom_col_grouped() +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = function(x) str_wrap(x, 15)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number(suffix = "%"),
                     limits = c(0, 100),
                     breaks = seq(0, 100, 10),
                     expand = EXPAND_TIGHT_TOP) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette_068) +
  labs_meta(meta, y = "Plans for postdoc or employment in the U.S.") +
  theme_tpa() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = AXIS_SIZE - 2))

save_chart(fig_068, "fig_068", size = "long")
```

# Figure 69 - Trends in Distribution of Employment Sector of Doctorate Recipients with Definite Postgraduation Commitments for Non-postdoc Employment in the United States (1993-2023) - TVH Recipients
```{r figure 069}
meta <- get_meta("fig_069")
df   <- read_sector_employment("fig_069")
fig  <- plot_sector_employment(df, meta, "Share of TVH doctorate recipients",
                               y_limits = c(0, 80),
                               y_breaks = seq(0, 80, 10))
save_chart(fig, "fig_069")
```

# Figure 70 - Trends in Distribution of Employment Sector of Doctorate Recipients with Definite Postgraduation Commitments for Non-postdoc Employment in the United States (1993-2023) - US Recipients
```{r figure 070}
meta <- get_meta("fig_070")
df   <- read_sector_employment("fig_070")
fig  <- plot_sector_employment(df, meta, "Share of US doctorate recipients",
                               y_limits = c(0, 60),
                               y_breaks = seq(0, 60, 10))
save_chart(fig, "fig_070")
```

# Figure 71 - STEM OPT Approvals, Applications Received, Approval Rates
```{r figure 071}
meta <- get_meta("fig_071")

df_071 <- read_fig("fig_071") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Year)) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric),
         `Approval Rate` = `Approval Rate` * 100)

df_071_bars <- df_071 %>%
  select(Year, Received, Approved) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Year, names_to = "Status", values_to = "Count") %>%
  mutate(Status = factor(Status, levels = c("Received", "Approved")))

primary_max   <- 20000
secondary_max <- 100
scale_factor <- primary_max / secondary_max

fig_071 <- ggplot() +
  geom_col(data = df_071_bars,
           aes(Year, Count, fill = Status),
           position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
           width = 0.7, alpha = ALPHA_COL) +
  geom_line(data = df_071,
          aes(Year, `Approval Rate` * scale_factor, color = "Approval rate"),
          linewidth = LINE_WIDTH) +
  geom_point(data = df_071,
             aes(Year, `Approval Rate` * scale_factor,
                 color = "Approval rate"),
             size = 2) +
  scale_x_years(df_071$Year, by = 1) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "Applications",
    labels = label_comma(),
    limits = c(0, primary_max),
    breaks = seq(0, primary_max, 2500),
    expand = EXPAND_TIGHT_TOP,
    sec.axis = sec_axis_scaled(scale_factor,
                               name = "Approval rate",
                               labels = label_number(suffix = "%"))
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = NULL,
                    values = c("Received" = tpa_colors[2],
                               "Approved" = tpa_colors[1])) +
  scale_color_manual(name = NULL,
                     values = c("Approval rate" = tpa_colors[5])) +
  labs_meta(meta) +
  theme_dual_axis()

save_chart(fig_071, "fig_071")
```

# Figure 72 - Trends in H-1B approvals, by Application Type (2009-2025)
```{r figure 072}
meta <- get_meta("fig_072")

df_072 <- read_fig("fig_072") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Year)) %>%
  select(Year, `New Approved`, `Renewal Approved`) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Year, names_to = "Type", values_to = "Count") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Count)) %>%
  mutate(Type = factor(Type, levels = c("Renewal Approved", "New Approved")))

palette_072 <- c(
  "New Approved"     = tpa_colors[1],
  "Renewal Approved" = tpa_colors[4]
)

fig_072 <- ggplot(df_072, aes(Year, Count, fill = Type)) +
  geom_area(alpha = ALPHA_AREA) +
  scale_x_years(df_072$Year, by = 1) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_comma(),
                     expand = EXPAND_BAR) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette_072,
                    breaks = c("New Approved", "Renewal Approved")) +
  labs_meta(meta, y = "H-1B approvals") +
  theme_tpa()

save_chart(fig_072, "fig_072")
```

# Figure 73 - Share of H-1B Visa Denials Per Fiscal Year
```{r figure 073}
meta <- get_meta("fig_073")
df   <- read_hb_denials("fig_073")
fig  <- plot_hb_denials(df, meta, "H-1B denials")
save_chart(fig, "fig_073")
```

# Figure 74 - Trends in H-1B approvals for NAICS Code 54 - Professional, Scientific, and Technical Services, by Application Type (2009-2025)
```{r figure 074}
meta <- get_meta("fig_074")

df_074 <- read_fig("fig_074") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Year)) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Year, names_to = "Type", values_to = "Count") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Count)) %>%
  mutate(Type = factor(Type, levels = c("Renewal Approved", "New Approved")))

palette_074 <- c(
  "New Approved"     = tpa_colors[2],
  "Renewal Approved" = tpa_colors[1]
)

fig_074 <- ggplot(df_074, aes(Year, Count, fill = Type)) +
  geom_area(alpha = ALPHA_AREA) +
  scale_x_years(df_074$Year, by = 1) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_comma(),
                     expand = EXPAND_BAR) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette_074,
                    breaks = c("New Approved", "Renewal Approved")) +
  labs_meta(meta, y = "H-1B approvals (NAICS 54)") +
  theme_tpa()

save_chart(fig_074, "fig_074")
```

# Figure 75 - Share of H-1B Visa Denials Per Fiscal Year for NAICS Code 54 - Professional, Scientific, and Technical Services
```{r figure 075}
meta <- get_meta("fig_075")
df   <- read_hb_denials("fig_075")
fig  <- plot_hb_denials(df, meta, "H-1B denials (NAICS 54)")
save_chart(fig, "fig_075")
```

# Figure 76 - Distribution of PERM Applications by Status (2008-2024)
```{r figure 076}
meta <- get_meta("fig_076")

df_076 <- read_fig("fig_076") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Year)) %>%
  select(Year, Certified = `Certified (Current + Expired)`, Denied) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Year, names_to = "Status", values_to = "Count") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Count)) %>%
  mutate(Status = factor(Status, levels = c("Denied", "Certified")))

palette_076 <- c(
  "Certified" = tpa_colors[1],
  "Denied"    = tpa_colors[6]
)

fig_076 <- ggplot(df_076, aes(Year, Count, fill = Status)) +
  geom_area(alpha = ALPHA_AREA) +
  scale_x_years(df_076$Year, by = 1) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_comma(),
                     expand = EXPAND_BAR) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette_076,
                    breaks = c("Certified", "Denied")) +
  labs_meta(meta, y = "PERM applications") +
  theme_tpa()

save_chart(fig_076, "fig_076")
```

# Figure 77 - Distribution of Country of Origin of Certified PERM Applications (2008-2024)
```{r figure 077}
meta <- get_meta("fig_077")

df_077 <- read_fig("fig_077") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Year)) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Year, names_to = "Country", values_to = "Count") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Count)) %>%
  mutate(Country = case_when(
    Country == "Republic of Korea" ~ "South Korea",
    Country == "Phillippines"      ~ "Philippines",
    TRUE                           ~ Country
  )) %>%
  order_by_latest(Country, Count)

labels_077 <- last_by_group(df_077, Year, Country)

palette_077 <- c(tpa_colors, "grey40")

fig_077 <- ggplot(df_077, aes(Year, Count, color = Country, group = Country)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = LINE_WIDTH_DENSE) +
  geom_label_repel_tpa(
    data         = labels_077,
    mapping      = aes(label = paste0(Country, ": ", label_comma()(Count))),
    nudge_x      = 0.5,
    hjust        = 0,
    direction    = "y",
    with_segment = TRUE
  ) +
  scale_x_years(df_077$Year, by = 2, pad_right = PAD_RIGHT_STANDARD) +
  scale_y_log10(labels = label_comma(),
                breaks  = c(10, 100, 500, 1000, 5000, 10000, 50000),
                expand  = EXPAND_LINE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = palette_077) +
  guides(color = "none") +
  labs_meta(meta, y = "PERM certifications (log scale)") +
  theme_tpa()

save_chart(fig_077, "fig_077")
```

# Figure 78 - Trends in J-1 Visa Participation by Country (Top 10 overall from the last decade)
```{r figure 078}
meta <- get_meta("fig_078")

df_078 <- read_fig("fig_078") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Year)) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Year, names_to = "Country", values_to = "Share") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Share)) %>%
  mutate(Share = Share * 100) %>%
  order_by_latest(Country, Share)

labels_078 <- last_by_group(df_078, Year, Country)

palette_078 <- c(tpa_colors, "grey40", "grey60")

fig_078 <- ggplot(df_078, aes(Year, Share, color = Country, group = Country)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = LINE_WIDTH_DENSE) +
  geom_label_repel_tpa(
    data         = labels_078,
    mapping      = aes(label = paste0(Country, ": ", fmt_pct_1(Share))),
    nudge_x      = 0.5,
    hjust        = 0,
    direction    = "y",
    with_segment = TRUE
  ) +
  scale_x_years(df_078$Year, by = 1, pad_right = PAD_RIGHT_STANDARD) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number(suffix = "%"),
                     limits = c(0, 12),
                     breaks = seq(0, 12, 2),
                     expand = EXPAND_BAR_TIGHT) +
  scale_color_manual(values = palette_078) +
  guides(color = "none") +
  labs_meta(meta, y = "Share of J-1 participants") +
  theme_tpa()

save_chart(fig_078, "fig_078")
```

# Figure 79 - Immigrant vs Native-Born Workforce Participation Rate Gap, by Country (2024)
```{r figure 079}
meta <- get_meta("fig_079")

df_079 <- read_fig("fig_079") %>%
  rename(Gap = `Gap with the native-born`) %>%
  mutate(Gap = as.numeric(Gap),
         Country = fct_reorder(Country, Gap))

palette_079 <- highlight_colors(
  all_values  = levels(df_079$Country),
  highlighted = c("United States", "OECD average"),
  palette     = c(tpa_colors[1], tpa_colors[3]),   # red, gold
  default     = tpa_colors[2]                       # navy
)

fig_079 <- ggplot(df_079, aes(Gap, Country, fill = Country)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "grey50", linewidth = LINE_WIDTH_REF) +
  geom_col(width = 0.75, alpha = ALPHA_COL) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f", Gap),
                hjust = if_else(Gap >= 0, -0.2, 1.2)),
            family = FONT_FAMILY,
            fontface = "bold",
            size = (DATA_LABEL_SIZE - 2) / .pt,
            color = "grey25") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-15, 20),
                     breaks = seq(-15, 20, 5),
                     expand = EXPAND_NONE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette_079) +
  guides(fill = "none") +
  labs_meta(meta, x = "Percentage point gap with the native-born") +
  theme_horizontal_bar() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = AXIS_SIZE - 2))

save_chart(fig_079, "fig_079", size = "long")
```

# Figure 80 - Gross Domestic Expenditure on R&D as a Share of GDP, by Selected Economy (1991-2023)
```{r figure 080}
meta <- get_meta("fig_080")
df   <- read_country_lines("fig_080", group_col = "Country", value_col = "Share")
fig  <- plot_country_lines(df, meta, "R&D as share of GDP",
                           value_col = "Share",
                           label_fmt = fmt_pct_1,
                           y_args    = list(
                             labels = label_number(suffix = "%"),
                             limits = c(0, 5.2),
                             breaks = seq(0, 5, 1),
                             expand = EXPAND_BAR_TIGHT
                           ))
save_chart(fig, "fig_080")
```

# Figure 81 - Trends in Share of International Student Enrollment in STEM Fields in U.S. Higher Education, by Selected Country (2009-2024)
```{r figure 081}
meta <- get_meta("fig_081")
df   <- read_country_lines("fig_081", group_col = "Country", value_col = "Share")
fig  <- plot_country_lines(df, meta, "STEM share of country's U.S. enrollment",
                           value_col = "Share",
                           label_fmt = fmt_pct_0,
                           y_args    = list(
                             labels = label_number(suffix = "%"),
                             limits = c(20, 90),
                             breaks = seq(20, 90, 10),
                             expand = EXPAND_LINE
                           ))
save_chart(fig, "fig_081")
```

# Figure 82 - Share of H-1B Approvals - Top 10 Companies by Count vs. All Other Companies (2009-2025)
```{r figure 082}
meta <- get_meta("fig_082")

df_082 <- read_fig("fig_082") %>%
  rename(Year = `Company Normalized`) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Year)) %>%
  mutate(Year = as.numeric(Year)) %>%
  select(Year,
         `Top 10 companies`    = `Top 10 Companies by Count`,
         `All other companies` = `All Other Companies`) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Year, names_to = "Group", values_to = "Share") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Share)) %>%
  mutate(Share = Share * 100,
         Group = factor(Group, levels = c("Top 10 companies",
                                          "All other companies")))

labels_082 <- fl_by_group(df_082, Year, Share, Group)

palette_082 <- c(
  "Top 10 companies"    = tpa_colors[2],
  "All other companies" = tpa_colors[6]
)

fig_082 <- ggplot(df_082, aes(Year, Share, color = Group, group = Group)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = LINE_WIDTH) +
  geom_label_repel_tpa(
    data         = labels_082,
    mapping      = aes(label = fmt_pct_1(Share)),
    direction    = "y",
    with_segment = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_x_years(df_082$Year, by = 1) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number(suffix = "%"),
                     limits = c(0, 80),
                     breaks = seq(0, 80, 10),
                     expand = EXPAND_BAR_TIGHT) +
  scale_color_manual(values = palette_082) +
  labs_meta(meta, y = "Share of H-1B approvals") +
  theme_tpa()

save_chart(fig_082, "fig_082")
```

# Figure 83 - Year of Last Enrollment Among Students Who Did Not Complete a Degree, by Cohort
```{r figure 083}
meta <- get_meta("fig_083")

df_083 <- read_fig("fig_083") %>%
  rename(Cohort = Year) %>%
  select(-`Attained Degree by Final Survey Year`) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Cohort, names_to = "Category", values_to = "Pct") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Pct)) %>%
  mutate(
    Category = case_when(
      str_detect(Category, "year 1")         ~ "Year 1",
      str_detect(Category, "year 2")         ~ "Year 2",
      str_detect(Category, "year 3")         ~ "Year 3",
      str_detect(Category, "year 4")         ~ "Year 4",
      str_detect(Category, "year 5")         ~ "Year 5",
      str_detect(Category, "year 6")         ~ "Year 6",
      str_detect(Category, "still enrolled") ~ "Still enrolled"
    ),
    Category = factor(Category, levels = c(
      "Year 1", "Year 2", "Year 3", "Year 4",
      "Year 5", "Year 6", "Still enrolled"
    )),
    Cohort = factor(Cohort, levels = c("1996/2001", "2004/2009", "2012/2017"))
  )

palette_083 <- c(
  "1996/2001" = tpa_colors[2],   # navy
  "2004/2009" = tpa_colors[1],   # red
  "2012/2017" = tpa_colors[4]    # green
)

fig_083 <- ggplot(df_083, aes(Category, Pct, fill = Cohort)) +
  geom_col_grouped() +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f", Pct)),
            position = pos_dodge_grouped(),
            vjust = -0.5,
            family = FONT_FAMILY,
            fontface = "bold",
            size = (DATA_LABEL_SIZE - 2) / .pt,
            color = "grey25") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number(suffix = "%"),
                   expand = EXPAND_BAR_XLARGE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette_083) +
  labs_meta(meta, y = "Share of students") +
  theme_tpa() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5))

save_chart(fig_083, "fig_083")
```

# Figure 84 - Bachelor's Degree Attainment and Enrollment Status for Students Who Entered STEM, by Cohort
```{r figure 084}
meta <- get_meta("fig_084")

df_084 <- read_fig("fig_084") %>%
  rename(Cohort   = Year,
         Left     = `Left without return`,
         Attained = `Degree Attained, Or Still Enrolled by Last Survey Year`) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Cohort, names_to = "Status", values_to = "Pct") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Pct)) %>%
  mutate(
    Status = factor(Status,
                    levels = c("Left", "Attained"),
                    labels = c("Left without return",
                               "Degree attained or still enrolled")),
    Cohort = factor(Cohort,
                    levels = c("2012/2017", "2004/2009", "1996/2001", "1990/1994"))
  )

palette_084 <- c(
  "Left without return"               = tpa_colors[2],   # navy
  "Degree attained or still enrolled" = tpa_colors[1]    # red
)

fig_084 <- ggplot(df_084, aes(Pct, Cohort, fill = Status)) +
  geom_col(width = BAR_WIDTH_NARROW, alpha = ALPHA_COL) +
  geom_text(aes(label = fmt_pct_1(Pct)),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
            color = "white", fontface = "bold",
            family = FONT_FAMILY, size = DATA_LABEL_SIZE / .pt) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = label_number(suffix = "%"),
                     limits = c(0, 100),
                     breaks = seq(0, 100, 20),
                     expand = EXPAND_NONE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette_084,
                    breaks = c("Left without return",
                               "Degree attained or still enrolled")) +
  labs_meta(meta, x = "Share of cohort") +
  theme_horizontal_bar()

save_chart(fig_084, "fig_084")
```

# Figure 85 - Participants in Optional Practical Training (OPT),OPT Participants (Overall and STEM)
```{r figure 085}
meta <- get_meta("fig_085")

df_085 <- read_fig("fig_085") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Year)) %>%
  rename(Share = `Share of All International Students`) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric))

scale_factor <- dual_axis_scale(
  primary_max   = 350000,
  secondary_max = 30
)

fig_085 <- ggplot(df_085, aes(Year)) +
  geom_col(aes(y = Count, fill = "Count"),
         width = 0.7, alpha = ALPHA_COL_LIGHT) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Share * scale_factor, color = "Share"),
          linewidth = LINE_WIDTH) +
  scale_x_years(df_085$Year) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "Number of international students",
    labels = label_comma(),
    limits = c(0, 350000),
    expand = EXPAND_TIGHT_TOP,
    sec.axis = sec_axis_scaled(scale_factor,
                               name = "Share of all international students",
                               labels = label_number(suffix = "%"))
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = NULL,
                    values = c("Count" = tpa_colors[2])) +
  scale_color_manual(name = NULL,
                     values = c("Share" = tpa_colors[1])) +
  labs_meta(meta) +
  theme_dual_axis()

save_chart(fig_085, "fig_085")
```

# Figure 86 - Top Computer Science University Rankings by CSRankings.com (2000 vs 2025)
```{r figure 086, fig.height=10}
meta <- get_meta("fig_086")

df_086 <- read_fig("fig_086") %>%
  mutate(
    rank_2000 = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(`2000`))),
    rank_2025 = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(`2025`))),
    delta     = rank_2000 - rank_2025,
    direction = case_when(
      is.na(rank_2000) ~ "New",
      delta > 0        ~ "Improved",
      delta < 0        ~ "Declined",
      TRUE             ~ "Unchanged"
    ),
    csv_order = row_number()
  ) %>%
  arrange(rank_2025, csv_order) %>%
  mutate(Institution = factor(Institution, levels = rev(Institution)))

df_arrows      <- df_086 %>% filter(!is.na(rank_2000))
df_points_only <- df_086 %>% filter(is.na(rank_2000))

palette_086 <- c(
  "Improved" = tpa_colors[4],   # green
  "Declined" = tpa_colors[1],   # red
  "New"      = "grey60"
)

fig_086 <- ggplot(df_086, aes(y = Institution)) +
  geom_segment(
    data = df_arrows,
    aes(x = rank_2000, xend = rank_2025,
        yend = Institution, color = direction),
    arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.18, "cm"), type = "closed"),
    linewidth = 0.7
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = df_points_only,
    aes(x = rank_2025, color = direction),
    size = POINT_SIZE,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  # 2000 rank labels (arrow tail)
  geom_text(
    data = df_arrows %>% filter(direction == "Improved"),
    aes(x = rank_2000, label = rank_2000),
    hjust = 1.3,
    size = (DATA_LABEL_SIZE - 3) / .pt,
    family = FONT_FAMILY,
    color = "grey25"
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = df_arrows %>% filter(direction == "Declined"),
    aes(x = rank_2000, label = rank_2000),
    hjust = -0.3,
    size = (DATA_LABEL_SIZE - 3) / .pt,
    family = FONT_FAMILY,
    color = "grey25"
  ) +
  # 2025 rank labels (arrow head)
  geom_text(
    data = df_arrows %>% filter(direction == "Improved"),
    aes(x = rank_2025, label = rank_2025),
    hjust = -0.3,
    size = (DATA_LABEL_SIZE - 3) / .pt,
    family = FONT_FAMILY,
    color = "grey25"
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = df_arrows %>% filter(direction == "Declined"),
    aes(x = rank_2025, label = rank_2025),
    hjust = 1.3,
    size = (DATA_LABEL_SIZE - 3) / .pt,
    family = FONT_FAMILY,
    color = "grey25"
  ) +
  # Delta labels on the far right
  geom_text(
    data = df_arrows,
    aes(x = -8, label = sprintf("%+d", delta), color = direction),
    hjust = 0,
    fontface = "bold",
    size = (DATA_LABEL_SIZE - 2) / .pt,
    family = FONT_FAMILY,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_x_reverse(
    breaks = seq(0, 160, 20),
    limits = c(165, -18),
    expand = EXPAND_NONE
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = palette_086,
    breaks = c("Improved", "Declined"),
    labels = c("Improved ranking", "Declined ranking")
  ) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(linewidth = 1.2))) +
  labs_meta(meta, x = "Rank") +
  theme_horizontal_bar() +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = AXIS_SIZE - 2),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

save_chart(fig_086, "fig_086", size = "long")
```

# Figure 87 - Trends in H-1B Denials, by Application Type (2009-2025)
```{r figure 087}
meta <- get_meta("fig_087")
df   <- read_hb_denials("fig_087")
fig  <- plot_hb_denials(df, meta, "H-1B denials")
save_chart(fig, "fig_087")
```

# Figure 88 - Trends in H-1B Denials for NAICS Code 54 - Professional, Scientific, and Technical Services, by Application Type (2009-2025)
```{r figure 088}
meta <- get_meta("fig_088")
df   <- read_hb_denials("fig_088")
fig  <- plot_hb_denials(df, meta, "H-1B denials (NAICS 54)")
save_chart(fig, "fig_088")
```

# Figure 89 - Trends in Science and Engineering Research Doctorate Recipients from U.S. Colleges and Universities, by Year and by Sex (1993-2023)
```{r figure 089}
meta <- get_meta("fig_089")

df_089 <- read_fig("fig_089") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Year)) %>%
  select(Year, Male, Female) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Year, names_to = "Sex", values_to = "Count") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Count)) %>%
  mutate(Sex = factor(Sex, levels = c("Male", "Female"))) %>%
  order_by_latest(Sex, Count)

palette_089 <- c("Male" = tpa_colors[2], "Female" = tpa_colors[1])

fig <- plot_country_lines(df_089, meta, "Doctorate recipients",
                          group_col   = "Sex",
                          value_col   = "Count",
                          label_fmt   = label_comma(),
                          pad_right   = PAD_RIGHT_NARROW,
                          color_scale = scale_color_manual(values = palette_089))
save_chart(fig, "fig_089")
```

# Figure 90 - Trends in Science and Engineering Research Doctorate Recipients from U.S. Colleges and Universities, by Year and by Citizenship Status (1978-2023)
```{r figure 090}
meta <- get_meta("fig_090")

df_090 <- read_fig("fig_090") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Year)) %>%
  rename(`U.S. citizens and permanent residents` = `U.S. citizen or permanent resident`,
         `Temporary visa holders`                = `Temporary visa holder`,
         `Unknown citizenship`                   = `Unknown citizenship`) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Year, names_to = "Status", values_to = "Count") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Count)) %>%
  order_by_total(Status, Count)

palette_090 <- c(
  "U.S. citizens and permanent residents" = tpa_colors[1],
  "Temporary visa holders"                = tpa_colors[4],
  "Unknown citizenship"                   = tpa_colors[8]
)

fig_090 <- ggplot(df_090, aes(Year, Count, fill = Status)) +
  geom_area(alpha = ALPHA_AREA) +
  scale_x_years(df_090$Year) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_comma(),
                     expand = EXPAND_BAR) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette_090) +
  labs_meta(meta, y = "Doctorate recipients") +
  theme_tpa()

save_chart(fig_090, "fig_090")
```

# Figure 91 - Share of Degree Completions by U.S. Nonresidents, by Field - Bachelors (2003-2023)
```{r figure 091}
meta <- get_meta("fig_091")
df   <- read_nonresident_field("fig_091")
fig  <- plot_nonresident_field(df, meta, "Nonresident share of bachelor's completions")
save_chart(fig, "fig_091")
```

# Figure 92 - Share of Degree Completions by U.S. Nonresidents, by Field - Masters (2003-2023)
```{r figure 092}
meta <- get_meta("fig_092")
df   <- read_nonresident_field("fig_092")
fig  <- plot_nonresident_field(df, meta, "Nonresident share of master's completions")
save_chart(fig, "fig_092")
```

# Figure 93 - Share of Degree Completions by U.S. Nonresidents, by Field - Doctoral (2003-2023)
```{r figure 093}
meta <- get_meta("fig_093")
df   <- read_nonresident_field("fig_093")
fig  <- plot_nonresident_field(df, meta, "Nonresident share of doctoral completions")
save_chart(fig, "fig_093")
```

# Figure 94 - Trends in International Student Doctorate Completions in STEM Fields in U.S. Higher Education, by Country (2009-2024)
```{r figure 094}
meta <- get_meta("fig_094")

df_094 <- read_fig("fig_094") %>%
  rename(Year = `Country or economy and field`) %>%
  mutate(across(-Year, as.character)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Year, names_to = "Country", values_to = "Count") %>%
  mutate(
    Year  = as.numeric(Year),
    Count = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(Count))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Year), !is.na(Count), Count > 0) %>%
  order_by_latest(Country, Count)

labels_094 <- last_by_group(df_094, Year, Country)

fig_094 <- ggplot(df_094, aes(Year, Count, color = Country, group = Country)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = LINE_WIDTH) +
  geom_label_repel_tpa(
    data         = labels_094,
    mapping      = aes(label = paste0(Country, ": ", label_comma()(Count))),
    nudge_x      = 0.5,
    hjust        = 0,
    direction    = "y",
    with_segment = TRUE
  ) +
  scale_x_years(df_094$Year, by = 1, pad_right = PAD_RIGHT_STANDARD) +
  scale_y_log10(labels = label_comma(),
                breaks  = c(50, 100, 500, 1000, 2500, 5000),
                expand  = EXPAND_LINE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(tpa_colors, "grey40")) +
  guides(color = "none") +
  labs_meta(meta, y = "Doctorate completions (log scale)") +
  theme_tpa()

save_chart(fig_094, "fig_094")
```

# Figure 95 - Trends in Post-Doctoral Appointees in Science, by Citizenship Status (1997-2023)
```{r figure 095}
meta <- get_meta("fig_095")
df   <- read_citizenship_area("fig_095")
fig  <- plot_citizenship_area(df, meta, "Postdoctoral appointees")
save_chart(fig, "fig_095")
```

# Figure 96 - Trends in Post-Doctoral Appointees in Engineering, by Citizenship Status (1997-2023)
```{r figure 096}
meta <- get_meta("fig_096")
df   <- read_citizenship_area("fig_096")
fig  <- plot_citizenship_area(df, meta, "Postdoctoral appointees")
save_chart(fig, "fig_096")
```

# Figure 97 - Trends in Post-Doctoral Appointees in Health, by Citizenship Status (1997-2023)
```{r figure 097}
meta <- get_meta("fig_097")
df   <- read_citizenship_area("fig_097")
fig  <- plot_citizenship_area(df, meta, "Postdoctoral appointees")
save_chart(fig, "fig_097")
```

# Figure 98 - Trends in Doctoral Production by Degree Level
```{r figure 98}
meta <- get_meta("fig_098")

m1 <- function(x) sprintf("%.1fM", x / 1e6)

df_098 <- read_levels("fig_098", value_col = "Count",
                      levels_order = c("Bachelors", "Masters", "Doctorate"))

last_098  <- last_by_group(df_098, Year, Level)
first_098 <- df_098 %>% group_by(Level) %>% slice_min(Year, n = 1) %>% ungroup()

fig_098 <- ggplot(df_098, aes(Year, Count, color = Level, group = Level)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = LINE_WIDTH) +
  geom_label_repel_tpa(
    data         = last_098,
    mapping      = aes(label = paste0(Level, ": ", m1(Count))),
    nudge_x      = 0.5,
    hjust        = 0,
    direction    = "y",
    with_segment = TRUE
  ) +
  geom_label_repel_tpa(
    data         = first_098,
    mapping      = aes(label = m1(Count)),
    nudge_x      = -0.5,
    hjust        = 1,
    direction    = "y",
    with_segment = TRUE
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(min(df_098$Year), max(df_098$Year), 1),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, PAD_RIGHT_NARROW))
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = m1, expand = EXPAND_LINE) +
  scale_color_levels() +
  guides(color = "none") +
  labs_meta(meta, y = "Degrees awarded") +
  theme_tpa()

save_chart(fig_098, "fig_098")
```

# Figure 99 - International Student Share of All Degree Completions
```{r figure 099}
meta <- get_meta("fig_099")
pct  <- label_percent(accuracy = 1)
df_099 <- read_levels(
  "fig_099",
  value_col    = "Share",
  levels_order = c("Bachelors", "Masters",
                   "All Doctorates (IPEDS)", "Research Doctorates (SED)")
) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Share))
last_099  <- last_by_group(df_099, Year, Level)
first_099 <- df_099 %>% group_by(Level) %>% slice_min(Year, n = 1) %>% ungroup()

fig_099 <- ggplot(df_099, aes(Year, Share, color = Level, group = Level)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = LINE_WIDTH) +
  geom_label_repel_tpa(
    data         = last_099,
    mapping      = aes(label = paste0(pct(Share), " - ", Level)),
    nudge_x      = 0.5,
    hjust        = 0,
    direction    = "y",
    with_segment = TRUE
  ) +
  geom_label_repel_tpa(
    data         = first_099,
    mapping      = aes(label = pct(Share)),
    nudge_x      = -0.5,
    hjust        = 1,
    direction    = "y",
    with_segment = TRUE
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(min(df_099$Year), max(df_099$Year), 2),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, .50))
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = pct, expand = EXPAND_LINE_WIDE) +
  scale_color_levels() +
  guides(color = "none") +
  labs_meta(meta, y = "Share of completions") +
  theme_tpa()
save_chart(fig_099, "fig_099")
```

# Figure 100 - Trends in Research Doctorate Recipients from U.S. Colleges and Universities, All Fields, by Year (1958-2023)
```{r figure 100}
meta <- get_meta("fig_100")

df_100 <- read_fig("fig_100") %>%
  mutate(
    across(everything(), as.numeric),
    stem_share = 100 * `Just S&E fields` / `Doctorate recipients (number)`
  )

labels_100 <- first_last_peak(
  df_100,
  Year,
  `Doctorate recipients (number)`
)

stem_labels <- bind_rows(
  df_100 %>% slice_min(Year, n = 1),
  df_100 %>% slice_max(stem_share, n = 1)
) %>%
  distinct(Year, .keep_all = TRUE)

fig_100 <- ggplot(df_100, aes(x = Year)) +

  # STEM area
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(
      ymin = 0,
      ymax = `Just S&E fields`
    ),
    fill = tpa_colors[2],
    alpha = 0.30
  ) +

  # Non-STEM area stacked above STEM
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(
      ymin = `Just S&E fields`,
      ymax = `Doctorate recipients (number)`
    ),
    fill = "grey80",
    alpha = 0.45
  ) +

  # Original line
  geom_line(
    aes(y = `Doctorate recipients (number)`),
    linewidth = LINE_WIDTH,
    color = tpa_colors[1]
  ) +

  # Total doctorate labels
  geom_label_repel_tpa(
    data = labels_100,
    mapping = aes(
      y = `Doctorate recipients (number)`,
      label = fmt_num_k(`Doctorate recipients (number)`)
    ),
    color = tpa_colors[1],
    nudge_y = 5000,
    with_segment = TRUE
  ) +

  # STEM share labels (first year + peak share year)
  geom_label_repel_tpa(
    data = stem_labels,
    mapping = aes(
      y = `Just S&E fields`,
      label = paste0(round(stem_share), "%")
    ),
    color = tpa_colors[2],
    nudge_y = -5000,
    with_segment = TRUE
  ) +

  scale_x_years(df_100$Year) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = label_comma(),
    expand = EXPAND_LINE_TALL
  ) +

  labs_meta(meta, y = "Doctorate recipients") +
  theme_tpa()

save_chart(fig_100, "fig_100")
```

# Figure 101 - International Students as a Share of Total U.S. Higher Education Enrollment
```{r fig_101}
meta <- get_meta("fig_101")

df_101 <- read_fig("fig_009") %>%
  select(Year, value = "Share of Total US Enrollment") %>%        
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric),
         value = fill_gaps(Year, value))   

labels_101 <- first_last_peak(df_101, Year, value)

fig_101 <- ggplot(df_101, aes(Year, value)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = LINE_WIDTH, color = tpa_colors[1]) +
  geom_label_repel_tpa(
    data         = labels_101,
    mapping      = aes(label = label_percent(accuracy = 0.1)(value)), 
    color        = tpa_colors[1],
    nudge_y      = 0.004,                   
    with_segment = TRUE
  ) +
  scale_x_years(df_101$Year) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1),  
                     expand = EXPAND_LINE_TALL) +
  labs_meta(meta, y = "Share of total US enrollment") +     
  theme_tpa()

save_chart(fig_101, "fig_101")
```

# Figure 102 - International Students in U.S. Higher Education, Count by Academic Level
```{r fig_102}
meta <- get_meta("fig_102")

df_102 <- read_fig("fig_102") %>%
  rename(
    `Graduate (unspecified)` = `Graduate - Unspecified`,
    `Non-degree`             = `Non-Degree`,
    OPT                      = `Optional Practical Training (OPT)`
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(-Year, as.numeric)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Year, names_to = "Level", values_to = "Count") %>%
  order_by_latest(Level, Count)

labels_102 <- last_by_group(df_102, Year, Level)

fig_102 <- ggplot(df_102, aes(Year, Count, color = Level, group = Level)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_label_repel_tpa(
    data = labels_102,
    mapping = aes(label = paste0(Level, ": ", label_comma()(Count))),
    nudge_x = 0.5,
    hjust = 0,
    direction = "y",
    with_segment = TRUE
  ) +
  scale_x_years(df_102$Year, pad_right = 0.50) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_comma(),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.05))) +
  scale_color_manual(values = acad_level_colors) +
  guides(color = "none") +
  labs_meta(meta, y = "International students enrolled") +
  theme_tpa()

save_chart(fig_102, "fig_102")
```

# Figure 103 - International Students in U.S. Higher Education, Share by Academic Level
```{r fig_103}
meta <- get_meta("fig_103")

df_103 <- read_fig("fig_103") %>%
  rename(
    `Graduate (unspecified)` = `Graduate - Unspecified`,
    `Non-degree`             = `Non-Degree`,
    OPT                      = `Optional Practical Training (OPT)`
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(-Year, as.numeric)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Year, names_to = "Level", values_to = "Count") %>%
  order_by_latest(Level, Count)

labels_103 <- last_by_group(df_103, Year, Level)

fig_103 <- ggplot(df_103, aes(Year, Count, color = Level, group = Level)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_label_repel_tpa(
    data = labels_103,
    mapping = aes(label = paste0(Level, ": ", label_comma()(Count),"%")),
    nudge_x = 0.5,
    hjust = 0,
    direction = "y",
    with_segment = TRUE
  ) +
  scale_x_years(df_103$Year, pad_right = 0.50) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_comma(),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.05))) +
  scale_color_manual(values = acad_level_colors) +
  guides(color = "none") +
  labs_meta(meta, y = "Share of International Enrollment (%)") +
  theme_tpa()

save_chart(fig_103, "fig_103")
```

# Figure 104 - International Students in U.S. Higher Education, Share by Academic Level
```{r fig_104}
meta <- get_meta("fig_104")

df_104 <- read_fig("fig_104")

fig_104 <- ggplot() +
  block_arrow_layers(df_104, Category, Change,
                     fills = arrow_fill,
                     divider_after = 1) +
  labs_meta(meta) +
  theme_arrows()

save_chart(fig_104, "fig_104", size = "standard")
```

# Figure 105 - Perspectives of Increases in International Enrollment
```{r fig_105}
meta <- get_meta("fig_105")

df_105 <- read_fig("fig_105") %>%
  rename(Reason = 1) %>%
  mutate(across(-Reason, as.numeric)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Reason, names_to = "Cohort", values_to = "Share") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Share)) %>%
  mutate(
    Cohort = factor(Cohort, levels = c("Fall 2018", "Fall 2021", "Fall 2025")),
    Reason = str_wrap(Reason, width = 50),                 # <- lower width = narrower text column
    Reason = factor(Reason, levels = rev(unique(Reason)))
  )

cohort_colors <- c(
  "Fall 2018" = tpa_colors[1],
  "Fall 2021" = tpa_colors[2],
  "Fall 2025" = tpa_colors[3]
)

# Spread crowded value labels horizontally; gap is in percentage points.
gap <- 4
labels_105 <- df_105 %>%
  group_by(Reason) %>%
  arrange(Share, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    spread  = accumulate(Share, ~ max(.y, .x + gap)),
    label_x = spread - (mean(spread) - mean(Share))
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

fig_105 <- ggplot(df_105, aes(Share, Reason, color = Cohort)) +
  geom_point(size = 3.5) +
  geom_text(
    data = labels_105,
    aes(x = label_x, label = paste0(Share, "%")),
    nudge_y = -0.34,
    size = (DATA_LABEL_SIZE - 2) / .pt,
    fontface = "bold",
    family = FONT_FAMILY,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.07, 0.07))) +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = expansion(add = c(0.8, 0.6))) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cohort_colors) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3.5))) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  labs_meta(meta) +
  theme_dotplot()

save_chart(fig_105, "fig_105", size="standard")
```

# Figure 106 - Perspectives of Decreases in International Enrollment
```{r fig_106}
meta <- get_meta("fig_106")

df_106 <- read_fig("fig_106") %>%
  rename(Reason = 1) %>%
  mutate(across(-Reason, as.numeric)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Reason, names_to = "Cohort", values_to = "Share") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Share)) %>%
  mutate(
    Cohort = factor(Cohort, levels = c("Fall 2018", "Fall 2021", "Fall 2025")),
    Reason = str_wrap(Reason, width = 50),                 # <- lower width = narrower text column
    Reason = factor(Reason, levels = rev(unique(Reason)))
  )

cohort_colors <- c(
  "Fall 2018" = tpa_colors[1],
  "Fall 2021" = tpa_colors[2],
  "Fall 2025" = tpa_colors[3]
)

# Spread crowded value labels horizontally; gap is in percentage points.
gap <- 4
labels_106 <- df_106 %>%
  group_by(Reason) %>%
  arrange(Share, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    spread  = accumulate(Share, ~ max(.y, .x + gap)),
    label_x = spread - (mean(spread) - mean(Share))
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

fig_106 <- ggplot(df_106, aes(Share, Reason, color = Cohort)) +
  geom_point(size = 3.5) +
  geom_text(
    data = labels_106,
    aes(x = label_x, label = paste0(Share, "%")),
    nudge_y = -0.34,
    size = (DATA_LABEL_SIZE - 2) / .pt,
    fontface = "bold",
    family = FONT_FAMILY,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.07, 0.07))) +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = expansion(add = c(0.8, 0.6))) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cohort_colors) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3.5))) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  labs_meta(meta) +
  theme_dotplot()

save_chart(fig_106, "fig_106", size="standard")
```

# Figure 107 - Institutional Undergraduate and Graduate Recruitment Priorities, Fall 2025
```{r fig_107}
meta <- get_meta("fig_107")

panel_colors <- c(
  "Undergraduate" = tpa_colors[1],   # gold
  "Graduate"      = tpa_colors[2]     # teal (not in tpa_colors; swap for tpa_colors[2] navy for house palette)
)

track_max <- 1.0   # grey track length; nudge up toward ~1.1 if fills look too long

df_107 <- read_fig("fig_107") %>%
  transmute(
    Rank                  = as.integer(str_remove(Rank, "Rank ")),
    Undergraduate_Country = `Undergraduate Country`,
    Undergraduate_Value   = as.numeric(`Undergraduate Percent`),
    Graduate_Country      = `Graduate Country`,
    Graduate_Value        = as.numeric(`Graduate Percent`)
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Rank, names_to = c("Panel", ".value"), names_sep = "_") %>%
  mutate(
    Panel   = factor(Panel, levels = c("Undergraduate", "Graduate")),
    Country = str_wrap(Country, width = 18),
    Country = reorder_within(Country, -Rank, Panel)   # rank 1 on top, per panel
  )

fig_107 <- ggplot(df_107, aes(y = Country)) +
  geom_col(aes(x = track_max), fill = "grey90", width = 0.65) +
  geom_col(aes(x = Value, fill = Panel), width = 0.65) +
  geom_text(aes(x = track_max, label = label_percent(accuracy = 1)(Value)),
            hjust = -0.25, fontface = "bold", color = "grey20",
            size = DATA_LABEL_SIZE / .pt, family = FONT_FAMILY) +
  facet_wrap(~ Panel, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.14))) +
  scale_y_reordered() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = panel_colors) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  labs_meta(meta) +
  theme_bullet()

save_chart(fig_107, "fig_107")
```
# Figure 108 - Top 10 countries by international undergraduate enrollment (count)
```{r 108}
meta <- get_meta("fig_108")

df_108 <- read_fig("fig_108") %>%
  mutate(across(-Year, as.numeric)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Year, names_to = "Country", values_to = "Count") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Count))

top_countries <- df_108 %>%
  filter(Year == max(Year)) %>%
  slice_max(Count, n = 8) %>%
  pull(Country)

df_108 <- df_108 %>%
  filter(Country %in% top_countries) %>%
  order_by_latest(Country, Count)

labels_108 <- last_by_group(df_108, Year, Country)

fig_108 <- ggplot(df_108, aes(Year, Count, color = Country, group = Country)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = LINE_WIDTH) +
  geom_label_repel_tpa(
    data         = labels_108,
    mapping      = aes(label = paste0(Country, ": ", label_comma()(Count))),
    nudge_x      = 0.5,
    hjust        = 0,
    direction    = "y",
    with_segment = TRUE
  ) +
  scale_x_years(df_108$Year, pad_right = .3) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_comma(),
                breaks = c(1000, 5000, 10000, 50000, 100000, 250000),
                expand = EXPAND_LINE) +
  scale_color_tpa() +
  guides(color = "none") +
  labs_meta(meta, y = "Enrolled International Students") +
  theme_tpa()

save_chart(fig_108, "fig_108")
```

# Figure 109 - Top 10 countries by international undergraduate enrollment (share)
```{r 109}
meta <- get_meta("fig_109")

df_109 <- read_fig("fig_109") %>%
  mutate(across(-Year, as.numeric)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Year, names_to = "Country", values_to = "Count") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Count))

top_countries <- df_109 %>%
  filter(Year == max(Year)) %>%
  slice_max(Count, n = 8) %>%
  pull(Country)

df_109 <- df_109 %>%
  filter(Country %in% top_countries) %>%
  order_by_latest(Country, Count)

labels_109 <- last_by_group(df_109, Year, Country)

fig_109 <- ggplot(df_109, aes(Year, Count, color = Country, group = Country)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = LINE_WIDTH) +
  geom_label_repel_tpa(
    data         = labels_109,
    mapping      = aes(label = paste0(Country, ": ", label_percent(accuracy = 0.1)(Count))),
    nudge_x      = 0.5,
    hjust        = 0,
    direction    = "y",
    with_segment = TRUE
  ) +
  scale_x_years(df_109$Year, pad_right = .3) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1),
                expand = EXPAND_LINE) +
  scale_color_tpa() +
  guides(color = "none") +
  labs_meta(meta, y = "Share of Enrolled International Students") +
  theme_tpa()

save_chart(fig_109, "fig_109")
```

# Figure 110 - Top 10 countries by international graduate enrollment (count)
```{r 110}
meta <- get_meta("fig_110")

df_110 <- read_fig("fig_110") %>%
  mutate(across(-Year, as.numeric)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Year, names_to = "Country", values_to = "Count") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Count))

top_countries <- df_110 %>%
  filter(Year == max(Year)) %>%
  slice_max(Count, n = 8) %>%
  pull(Country)

df_110 <- df_110 %>%
  filter(Country %in% top_countries) %>%
  order_by_latest(Country, Count)

labels_110 <- last_by_group(df_110, Year, Country)

fig_110 <- ggplot(df_110, aes(Year, Count, color = Country, group = Country)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = LINE_WIDTH) +
  geom_label_repel_tpa(
    data         = labels_110,
    mapping      = aes(label = paste0(Country, ": ", label_comma()(Count))),
    nudge_x      = 0.5,
    hjust        = 0,
    direction    = "y",
    with_segment = TRUE
  ) +
  scale_x_years(df_110$Year, pad_right = .3) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_comma(),
                expand = EXPAND_LINE) +
  scale_color_tpa() +
  guides(color = "none") +
  labs_meta(meta, y = "Enrolled International Students") +
  theme_tpa()

save_chart(fig_110, "fig_110")
```

# Figure 111 - Top 10 countries by international graduate enrollment (share)
```{r 111}
meta <- get_meta("fig_111")

df_111 <- read_fig("fig_111") %>%
  mutate(across(-Year, as.numeric)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Year, names_to = "Country", values_to = "Count") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Count))

top_countries <- df_111 %>%
  filter(Year == max(Year)) %>%
  slice_max(Count, n = 8) %>%
  pull(Country)

df_111 <- df_111 %>%
  filter(Country %in% top_countries) %>%
  order_by_latest(Country, Count)

labels_111 <- last_by_group(df_111, Year, Country)

fig_111 <- ggplot(df_111, aes(Year, Count, color = Country, group = Country)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = LINE_WIDTH) +
  geom_label_repel_tpa(
    data         = labels_111,
    mapping      = aes(label = paste0(Country, ": ", label_percent(accuracy = 0.1)(Count))),
    nudge_x      = 0.5,
    hjust        = 0,
    direction    = "y",
    with_segment = TRUE
  ) +
  scale_x_years(df_111$Year, pad_right = .3) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1),
                expand = EXPAND_LINE) +
  scale_color_tpa() +
  guides(color = "none") +
  labs_meta(meta, y = "Share of Enrolled International Students") +
  theme_tpa()

save_chart(fig_111, "fig_111")
```

# Figure 112 - What Share of Each Country's International Students Are Enrolled in Engineering?
```{r fig_112}
meta <- get_meta("fig_112")

df_112 <- read_fig("fig_112") %>%
  mutate(across(-Year, as.numeric)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Year, names_to = "Country", values_to = "Count") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Count))

top_countries <- df_112 %>%
  filter(Year == max(Year)) %>%
  slice_max(Count, n = 8) %>%
  pull(Country)

df_112 <- df_112 %>%
  filter(Country %in% top_countries) %>%
  order_by_latest(Country, Count)

labels_112 <- last_by_group(df_112, Year, Country)

fig_112 <- ggplot(df_112, aes(Year, Count, color = Country, group = Country)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = LINE_WIDTH) +
  geom_label_repel_tpa(
    data         = labels_112,
    mapping      = aes(label = paste0(Country, ": ", label_percent(accuracy = 0.1)(Count))),
    nudge_x      = 0.5,
    hjust        = 0,
    direction    = "y",
    with_segment = TRUE
  ) +
  scale_x_years(df_112$Year, pad_right = .3) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1),
                expand = EXPAND_LINE) +
  scale_color_tpa() +
  guides(color = "none") +
  labs_meta(meta, y = "Share of Enrolled International Students") +
  theme_tpa()

save_chart(fig_112, "fig_112")
```

# Figure 113 - What Share of Each Country's International Students Are Enrolled in Math and Computer Science?
```{r fig_113}
meta <- get_meta("fig_113")

df_113 <- read_fig("fig_113") %>%
  mutate(across(-Year, as.numeric)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Year, names_to = "Country", values_to = "Count") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Count))

top_countries <- df_113 %>%
  filter(Year == max(Year)) %>%
  slice_max(Count, n = 8) %>%
  pull(Country)

df_113 <- df_113 %>%
  filter(Country %in% top_countries) %>%
  order_by_latest(Country, Count)

labels_113 <- last_by_group(df_113, Year, Country)

fig_113 <- ggplot(df_113, aes(Year, Count, color = Country, group = Country)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = LINE_WIDTH) +
  geom_label_repel_tpa(
    data         = labels_113,
    mapping      = aes(label = paste0(Country, ": ", label_percent(accuracy = 0.1)(Count))),
    nudge_x      = 0.5,
    hjust        = 0,
    direction    = "y",
    with_segment = TRUE
  ) +
  scale_x_years(df_113$Year, pad_right = .3) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1),
                expand = EXPAND_LINE) +
  scale_color_tpa() +
  guides(color = "none") +
  labs_meta(meta, y = "Share of Enrolled International Students") +
  theme_tpa()

save_chart(fig_113, "fig_113")
```

# Figure 114 - What Share of Each Country's International Students Are Enrolled in Physical and Life Sciences?
```{r fig_114}
meta <- get_meta("fig_114")

df_114 <- read_fig("fig_114") %>%
  mutate(across(-Year, as.numeric)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Year, names_to = "Country", values_to = "Count") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Count))

top_countries <- df_114 %>%
  filter(Year == max(Year)) %>%
  slice_max(Count, n = 8) %>%
  pull(Country)

df_114 <- df_114 %>%
  filter(Country %in% top_countries) %>%
  order_by_latest(Country, Count)

labels_114 <- last_by_group(df_114, Year, Country)

fig_114 <- ggplot(df_114, aes(Year, Count, color = Country, group = Country)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = LINE_WIDTH) +
  geom_label_repel_tpa(
    data         = labels_114,
    mapping      = aes(label = paste0(Country, ": ", label_percent(accuracy = 0.1)(Count))),
    nudge_x      = 0.5,
    hjust        = 0,
    direction    = "y",
    with_segment = TRUE
  ) +
  scale_x_years(df_114$Year, pad_right = .3) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1),
                expand = EXPAND_LINE) +
  scale_color_tpa() +
  guides(color = "none") +
  labs_meta(meta, y = "Share of Enrolled International Students") +
  theme_tpa()

save_chart(fig_114, "fig_114")
```

# Figure 115 - Who Actually Works in STEM After Earning a STEM Degree?
```{r}
# shared prep -- combine US-born (fig_027) and foreign-born (fig_028)
# into one long frame with a Population column
prep_conversion <- function() {
  read_one <- function(name, pop) {
    read_fig(name) %>%
      mutate(across(-Year, as.numeric)) %>%
      pivot_longer(-Year, names_to = "Degree", values_to = "Rate") %>%
      mutate(Rate = Rate * 100, Population = pop)
  }

  bind_rows(
    read_one("fig_027", "U.S.-born"),
    read_one("fig_028", "Foreign-born")
  ) %>%
    mutate(
      Degree = recode(Degree,
        "bachelors"    = "Bachelors",
        "masters"      = "Masters",
        "doctorates"   = "Doctorates",
        "doctors"      = "Doctorates",
        "professional" = "Professional"),
      Degree = factor(Degree, levels = c("Doctorates", "Professional", "Masters", "Bachelors"))
    )
}

meta <- get_meta("fig_115")

first_yr <- 2003
last_yr  <- 2023

# long form: one row per Degree × Population × Year, with Year as a factor
# so it can drive the open/filled shape legend
df_db <- prep_conversion() %>%
  filter(Year %in% c(first_yr, last_yr)) %>%
  mutate(Year = factor(Year, levels = c(first_yr, last_yr)))

# wide, just for the connecting segments
df_seg <- df_db %>%
  select(Degree, Population, Year, Rate) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Year, values_from = Rate, names_prefix = "Y")

fig_db <- ggplot(df_db, aes(y = Degree)) +
  geom_segment(data = df_seg,
               aes(x = Y2003, xend = Y2023, yend = Degree, color = Population),
               linewidth = 1.1, alpha = 0.55) +
  # both years drawn as shape 21; Year drives fill via the shape legend
  geom_point(aes(x = Rate, color = Population, shape = Year),
             fill = "white", stroke = 1.2, size = 3.8) +
  geom_point(data = filter(df_db, Year == last_yr),
             aes(x = Rate, color = Population, fill = Population),
             shape = 21, stroke = 0, size = 4) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = label_number(suffix = "%"),
                     limits = c(20, 85), breaks = seq(20, 80, 10),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.10))) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("U.S.-born"    = tpa_colors[2],
                                "Foreign-born" = tpa_colors[1])) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("U.S.-born"    = tpa_colors[2],
                               "Foreign-born" = tpa_colors[1]),
                    guide = "none") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("2003" = 21, "2023" = 19),
                     labels = c("2003" = "2003 (open)", "2023" = "2023 (filled)")) +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(order = 1, override.aes = list(shape = 19, size = 4)),
    shape = guide_legend(order = 2,
                         override.aes = list(color = "grey40", fill = "white"))
  ) +
  labs_meta(meta, y = NULL) +
  theme_horizontal_bar()

save_chart(fig_db, "fig_115")
```

# Figure 116 - Top-10 H1B Visa Granted Firms Share Over time
```{r fig_116}
meta <- get_meta("fig_116")

# true top-10-by-year share: rank all firms each year, sum the top 10
df_116 <- fig030_shares() %>%
  group_by(Year) %>%
  slice_max(Count, n = 10) %>%
  summarise(value = sum(Share), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(Year = as.numeric(Year))

labels <- first_last_peak(df_116, Year, value) %>%
  mutate(hj = dplyr::case_when(
    Year == min(df_116$Year) ~ -0.4,   # first point: label to the RIGHT (inward)
    Year == max(df_116$Year) ~  1.3,   # last point:  label to the LEFT (inward)
    TRUE                       ~  0.5    # peak: stays centered
  ))

fig_116 <- ggplot(df_116, aes(Year, value)) +
  geom_line(color = tpa_colors[1], linewidth = LINE_WIDTH) +
  geom_point(data = labels, color = tpa_colors[1], size = POINT_SIZE) +
  # peak label: house wrapper, centered above the point
  geom_text_tpa(data    = filter(labels, hj == .5),
                mapping = aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", value)),
                color   = tpa_colors[1],
                vjust   = 1.5) +
  # endpoint labels: nudged inward so they don't clip the panel edges
  geom_text(data    = filter(labels, hj != 0.5),
            mapping = aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", value), hjust = hj),
            color   = tpa_colors[1], fontface = "bold",
            family  = FONT_FAMILY, size = DATA_LABEL_SIZE / .pt) +
  scale_x_years(df_116$Year, by = 1) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number(suffix = "%"),
                     limits = c(50, 75),
                     breaks = seq(50, 75, 5),
                     expand = EXPAND_BAR_TALL) +
  labs_meta(meta, y = "Top 10 employers' share of approvals") +
  theme_tpa()

save_chart(fig_116, "fig_116")
```

# Figure 117 - How Does Founder Origin Vary Across AI Startup Valuations?
```{r fig_117}
meta <- get_meta("fig_117")

tier_levels  <- c("<$1B", "$1–10B", "$10–100B", "≥$100B")
origin_colors <- c("Foreign-founded"  = tpa_colors[1],
                   "Domestic-founded" = tpa_colors[2])

df_tier <- read_fig("fig_117") %>%
  rename(Origin = Binary) %>%
  mutate(Origin = recode(Origin,
    "Has All U.S. Born Founders"            = "Domestic-founded",
    "Has At Least One Foreign-Born Founder" = "Foreign-founded")) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Origin, names_to = "Tier", values_to = "n") %>%
  mutate(
    n    = replace_na(as.numeric(n), 0),          # blank ≥$100B cell -> 0
    Tier = factor(Tier, levels = tier_levels),
    Origin = factor(Origin, levels = c("Domestic-founded", "Foreign-founded"))
  )

fig_117 <- ggplot(df_tier, aes(Tier, n, fill = Origin)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = BAR_WIDTH),
           width = BAR_WIDTH, alpha = ALPHA_COL) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n, color = Origin),
            position = position_dodge(width = BAR_WIDTH),
            vjust = -0.4, size = DATA_LABEL_SIZE / .pt,
            fontface = "bold", show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = EXPAND_BAR_TALL) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = origin_colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = origin_colors) +
  labs_meta(meta, y = "Number of companies") +
  theme_tpa() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5))

save_chart(fig_117, "fig_117")
```

# Table 1 - US Universities Count in Top Universities Over Time
```{r table 1}
meta    <- get_meta("tab_001")
tab_001 <- build_ranking_table("tab_001", meta, integer_cols = TRUE)
tab_001
```

```{r table 002}
meta    <- get_meta("tab_002")
tab_002 <- build_ranking_table("tab_002", meta, integer_cols = FALSE)
tab_002
```

```{r table 003}
meta    <- get_meta("tab_003")
tab_003 <- build_eb_table("tab_003", meta)
tab_003
```

```{r table 004}
meta    <- get_meta("tab_004")
tab_004 <- build_eb_table("tab_004", meta)
tab_004
```

```{r table 005}
meta    <- get_meta("tab_005")
tab_005 <- build_eb_table("tab_005", meta)
tab_005
```

# Table 6 - Change (1995-2024) in Int. Share of STEM Degrees Awarded by Field - Bachelors
```{r table 006}
meta_a <- get_meta("tab_006a")
meta_b <- get_meta("tab_006b")
meta_c <- get_meta("tab_006c")
meta_d  <- get_meta("tab_006d")

tab_006a <- build_change_table("tab_006a", meta_a)
tab_006b <- build_change_table("tab_006b", meta_b)
tab_006c <- build_change_table("tab_006c", meta_c)
tab_006d <- build_change_table_wide("tab_006d", meta_d)


tab_006a
tab_006b
tab_006c
tab_006d
```

# Table 7 - Change (1995-2024) in Int. Share of STEM Degrees Awarded by Field - Bachelors
```{r table 007}
meta_007 <- get_meta("tab_007")

tab_007 <- build_region_table(
  name = "tab_007",
  meta = meta_007
)

tab_007
```

# Table 8 - What Share of Each Country's International Students Are Enrolled in Key STEM Fields?
```{r table 008}
meta <- get_meta("tab_008")

field_files <- c(
  "Engineering"              = "fig_112",
  "Math & Computer Science"  = "fig_113",
  "Physical & Life Sciences" = "fig_114"
)

field_labels <- names(field_files)

read_field_long <- function(name) {
  read_fig(name) %>%
    mutate(across(-Year, ~ suppressWarnings(as.numeric(na_if(as.character(.x), "-"))))) %>%
    pivot_longer(-Year, names_to = "Country", values_to = "Share") %>%
    filter(!is.na(Share))
}

long_all <- imap(field_files, ~ read_field_long(.x) %>% mutate(Field = .y)) %>%
  bind_rows()

summ <- long_all %>%
  filter(Year %in% c(2009, 2024)) %>%
  mutate(point = if_else(Year == 2009, "First", "Last")) %>%
  select(Field, Country, point, Share) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = point, values_from = Share) %>%
  filter(!is.na(First), !is.na(Last)) %>%
  mutate(First = First * 100, Last = Last * 100,
         Change = (Last - First) / First * 100)

# keep only countries with both 2009 and 2024 values in all three fields
keep_countries <- summ %>% count(Country) %>% filter(n == 3) %>% pull(Country)
summ <- summ %>% filter(Country %in% keep_countries)

ord_cols <- as.vector(t(outer(field_labels, c("First", "Last", "Change"),
                              paste, sep = "_")))

country_order <- c(
  "China",
  "India",
  "South Korea",
  "Canada",
  "Japan",
  "Taiwan",
  "Saudi Arabia",
  "Mexico",
  "Vietnam",
  "Brazil",
  "Turkey/Türkiye",
  "Nigeria",
  "United Kingdom",
  "Germany",
  "Hong Kong",
  "Nepal",
  "Indonesia",
  "France",
  "Colombia",
  "Pakistan"
)

df_008 <- summ %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = Field,
    values_from = c(First, Last, Change),
    names_glue  = "{Field}_{.value}"
  ) %>%
  select(Country, all_of(ord_cols)) %>%
  arrange(match(Country, country_order)) %>%
  # ordered by mean field-share change; swap to e.g.
  # arrange(desc(`Engineering_Last`)) to order by 2024 engineering share
  mutate(.avg = rowMeans(across(ends_with("_Change")), na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  select(-.avg)

build_field_share_table(df_008, "tab_008", meta, field_labels)
```

# Table 09 - International Share of U.S. Graduate Enrollment, by Field and Citizenship Status (1980–2024)
```{r tab_009}
meta <- get_meta("tab_009")

cite_files <- c(
  "Science"     = "fig_015",
  "Engineering" = "fig_016",
  "Health"      = "fig_017"
)

read_cite_long <- function(name) {
  read_fig(name) %>%
    mutate(across(-Year, ~ suppressWarnings(as.numeric(na_if(as.character(.x), "-"))))) %>%
    pivot_longer(-Year, names_to = "Group", values_to = "Count") %>%
    filter(!is.na(Count))
}

long_all <- imap(cite_files, ~ read_cite_long(.x) %>% mutate(Field = .y)) %>%
  bind_rows() %>%
  mutate(Group = recode(Group,
    "U.S. citizens and permanent residents" = "USC",
    "Temporary visa holders"                = "TVH"))

first_year <- min(long_all$Year, na.rm = TRUE)
last_year  <- max(long_all$Year, na.rm = TRUE)

# counts -> within-field citizenship share, per Field × Year
shares <- long_all %>%
  filter(Year %in% c(first_year, last_year)) %>%
  group_by(Field, Year) %>%
  mutate(Share = Count / sum(Count) * 100) %>%
  ungroup()

summ <- shares %>%
  mutate(point = if_else(Year == first_year, "First", "Last")) %>%
  select(Field, Group, point, Share) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = point, values_from = Share) %>%
  mutate(Change = (Last - First) / First * 100)   # relative change in share

ord_cols <- as.vector(t(outer(c("USC", "TVH"),
                              c("First", "Last", "Change"), paste, sep = "_")))

field_order <- c("Science", "Engineering", "Health")

df_009 <- summ %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = Group,
    values_from = c(First, Last, Change),
    names_glue  = "{Group}_{.value}"
  ) %>%
  select(Field, all_of(ord_cols)) %>%
  arrange(match(Field, field_order))

build_citizenship_table(df_009, "tab_009", meta,
                        first_year = first_year, last_year = last_year,
                        value_is_share = TRUE,
                        footnote = paste(
                          "Within-field citizenship share of U.S. graduate enrollment in",
                          "science, engineering, and health. Change is the relative change",
                          "in share between", first_year, "and", last_year, "."))
```

# Table 10 - Research Doctorate Recipients, by Field and Citizenship Status (2014–2024)
```{r table_010}
meta <- get_meta("tab_010")

phd_files <- c(
  "USC" = "fig_018",
  "TVH" = "fig_019"
)

read_phd_long <- function(name) {
  read_fig(name) %>%
    mutate(across(-Year, ~ suppressWarnings(as.numeric(na_if(as.character(.x), "-"))))) %>%
    pivot_longer(-Year, names_to = "Field", values_to = "Count") %>%
    filter(!is.na(Count)) %>%
    mutate(Field = recode(Field, "Social Science" = "Social Sciences"))
}

long_all <- imap(phd_files, ~ read_phd_long(.x) %>% mutate(Group = .y)) %>%
  bind_rows()

first_year <- min(long_all$Year, na.rm = TRUE)
last_year  <- max(long_all$Year, na.rm = TRUE)

summ <- long_all %>%
  filter(Year %in% c(first_year, last_year)) %>%
  mutate(point = if_else(Year == first_year, "First", "Last")) %>%
  select(Field, Group, point, Count) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = point, values_from = Count) %>%
  mutate(Change = (Last - First) / First * 100)

# wide counts: USC_First/Last/Change, TVH_First/Last/Change
counts_wide <- summ %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = Group,
    values_from = c(First, Last, Change),
    names_glue  = "{Group}_{.value}"
  )

# international share = TVH / (TVH + USC), per year, + relative change
df_010 <- counts_wide %>%
  mutate(
    SHR_First  = TVH_First / (TVH_First + USC_First) * 100,
    SHR_Last   = TVH_Last  / (TVH_Last  + USC_Last)  * 100,
    SHR_Change = (SHR_Last - SHR_First) / SHR_First * 100
  ) %>%
  select(Field,
         USC_First, USC_Last, USC_Change,
         TVH_First, TVH_Last, TVH_Change,
         SHR_First, SHR_Last, SHR_Change) %>%
  arrange(Field == "Non-sciences", desc(TVH_Last))

build_citizenship_table(df_010, "tab_010", meta,
                        first_year = first_year, last_year = last_year,
                        value_is_share = FALSE,
                        share_group = TRUE,
                        footnote = paste(
                          "Research doctorate recipients by field and citizenship.",
                          "Change is the percent change between", first_year, "and", last_year, ".",
                          "International share is temporary visa holders as a percentage of",
                          "all recipients in the field; its change is relative.",
                          "Fields ordered by 2024 international count; non-sciences shown for comparison."))
```

# Table 11 - Temporary visa holder share of employment by occupation, 2017 / 2021 / 2023 
```{r}
meta <- get_meta("tab_011")

short_names <- c(
  "Biological, agricultural, and other life scientists" = "Biological scientists",
  "Computer and mathematical scientists"                = "Computer/math scientists",
  "Physical and related scientists"                     = "Physical scientists",
  "Social and related scientists"                        = "Social scientists",
  "Engineers"                                            = "Engineers",
  "S&E-related occupations"                               = "S&E-related occupations",
  "Non-S&E occupations"                                   = "Non-S&E occupations"
)

row_order <- c("Computer/math scientists", "Engineers", "Biological scientists",
               "Physical scientists", "Social scientists",
               "S&E-related occupations", "Non-S&E occupations")

df_011 <- read_fig("tab_011") %>%
  mutate(across(-Year, as.numeric)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Year, names_to = "Occupation", values_to = "Rate") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Rate), Year %in% c(2017, 2019, 2021, 2023)) %>%
  mutate(Rate = Rate * 100,
         Occupation = recode(Occupation, !!!short_names)) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Year, values_from = Rate, names_prefix = "Y") %>%
  mutate(
    Chg2019 = (Y2019 - Y2017) / Y2017 * 100,
    Chg2021 = (Y2021 - Y2019) / Y2019 * 100,
    Chg2023 = (Y2023 - Y2021) / Y2021 * 100,
    Change  = (Y2023 - Y2017) / Y2017 * 100,
    Occupation = factor(Occupation, levels = row_order)
  ) %>%
  arrange(Occupation) %>%
  select(Occupation, Y2017, Chg2019, Chg2021, Chg2023, Y2023, Change)

tab_011 <- build_occupation_share_table(
  df_011, "tab_011", meta,
  level_cols = c("Y2017", "Y2023"),
  chg_cols   = c("Chg2019", "Chg2021", "Chg2023")
)

tab_011
```


# Table 12 - Top H1B Visa Employers in 2017 and 2025
```{r tab_012}
meta <- get_meta("tab_012")

shares <- fig030_shares()

# union of firms that were top-10 in EITHER year
union_firms <- shares %>%
  filter(Year %in% c(2017, 2025)) %>%
  group_by(Year) %>%
  slice_max(Count, n = 10) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  distinct(Company) %>%
  pull(Company)

wide <- shares %>%
  filter(Year %in% c(2017, 2025), Company %in% union_firms) %>%
  select(Company, Year, Share) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Year, values_from = Share, names_prefix = "Y")

df_012 <- wide %>%
  mutate(
    Company = recode(Company, !!!short_names),
    Y1 = Y2017, Y2 = Y2025,
    Change = if_else(Y2017 > 0, (Y2025 - Y2017) / Y2017 * 100, NA_real_)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(Change)) %>%          # order by 2025 share (today's leaders first)
  select(Company, Y1, Y2, Change)

tab_012 <- build_h1b_top10_table(df_012, "tab_012", meta,
                                 first_year = 2017, last_year = 2025)
tab_012
```

# Table 13 
```{r tab_013}
meta <- get_meta("tab_013")

# short row labels -- the raw CSV categories are very long
short_cats <- c(
  "Employed in the U.S. Labor Force in a STEM Occupation Directed Related to Science and Engineering"   = "STEM, directly S&E-related",
  "Employed in the U.S. Labor Force in a STEM Occupation Indirectly Related to Science and Engineering" = "STEM, indirectly S&E-related",
  "Employed in the U.S. Labor Force in a STEM Occupation with a STEM middle skill"                      = "STEM, middle-skill",
  "Employed in the U.S. Labor Force in a non-STEM Occupation"                                            = "Non-STEM occupation",
  "Unemployed in the U.S. Labor Force"                                                                   = "Unemployed",
  "Not in the U.S. labor force"                                                                          = "Not in labor force",
  "Total"                                                                                                = "Total"
)

row_order <- c("STEM, directly S&E-related", "STEM, indirectly S&E-related",
               "STEM, middle-skill", "Non-STEM occupation",
               "Unemployed", "Not in labor force", "Total")

df_013 <- read_fig("fig_025") %>%
  mutate(
    total_n = US_citizen + TPV,
    Citizen = US_citizen / total_n * 100,
    TVH     = TPV / total_n * 100,
    Category = recode(Category, !!!short_cats),
    Category = factor(Category, levels = row_order)
  ) %>%
  arrange(Category) %>%
  select(Category, Citizen, TVH)

tab_013 <- build_labor_citizenship_table(df_013, "tab_013", meta)
tab_013
```

# Export to PDF 
```{r export_pdf, include=FALSE}
library(magick)
library(pdftools)

# ---- Page dimensions ----------------------------------------
page_w_px  <- round(8.5  * 300)
page_h_px  <- round(11.0 * 300)
margin_px  <- round(0.20 * 300)
content_h  <- page_h_px - (margin_px * 2)

# ---- Chart and table manifests ------------------------------
chart_files <- c(
  "fig_001", "fig_002", "fig_003", "fig_004", "fig_005",
  "fig_006", "fig_007", "fig_008", "fig_009", "fig_010",
  "fig_011", "fig_012", "fig_013", "fig_014", "fig_015",
  "fig_016", "fig_017", "fig_018", "fig_019", "fig_020",
  "fig_021", "fig_022", "fig_023", "fig_024", "fig_025",
  "fig_026", "fig_027", "fig_028", "fig_029", "fig_030",
  "fig_031", "fig_032", "fig_033", "fig_034", "fig_035",
  "fig_036", "fig_037",
  "fig_038a", "fig_038b", "fig_038c", "fig_038d",
  "fig_039", "fig_040", "fig_041", "fig_042", "fig_043",
  "fig_044", "fig_045", "fig_046", "fig_047",
  "fig_048",
  "fig_048_acl", "fig_048_acml", "fig_048_aistats", "fig_048_coling",
  "fig_048_colt", "fig_048_corl", "fig_048_cvpr", "fig_048_emnlp",
  "fig_048_iccv", "fig_048_iclr", "fig_048_icml", "fig_048_icra",
  "fig_048_ijcai", "fig_048_iros", "fig_048_naacl", "fig_048_nips",
  "fig_048_rss", "fig_048_siggraphasia", "fig_048_uai", "fig_048_wacv",
  "fig_049", "fig_050", "fig_051", "fig_052", "fig_053",
  "fig_054", "fig_055", "fig_056", "fig_057", "fig_058",
  "fig_059", "fig_060", "fig_061", "fig_062", "fig_063",
  "fig_064", "fig_065", "fig_066", "fig_067", "fig_068",
  "fig_069", "fig_070", "fig_071", "fig_072", "fig_073",
  "fig_074", "fig_075", "fig_076", "fig_077", "fig_078",
  "fig_079", "fig_080", "fig_081", "fig_082", "fig_083",
  "fig_084", "fig_085", "fig_086", "fig_087", "fig_088",
  "fig_089", "fig_090", "fig_091", "fig_092", "fig_093",
  "fig_094", "fig_095", "fig_096", "fig_097", "fig_098",
  "fig_099", "fig_100", "fig_101", "fig_102", "fig_103"
)

table_files <- c(
  "tab_001", "tab_002", "tab_003", "tab_004", "tab_005", "tab_006a", "tab_006b", "tab_006c", "tab_006d"
)

# ---- TOC page count -----------------------------------------
# Calculate upfront so content page numbers are correct from the start
toc_per_page <- 30
n_toc_pages  <- ceiling((length(chart_files) + length(table_files)) / toc_per_page)

# ---- Helper: stamp page number on an image ------------------
stamp_page_number <- function(img, page_num) {
  image_annotate(
    img,
    text     = as.character(page_num),
    gravity  = "South",
    location = "+0+40",
    size     = 36,
    font     = "Source Sans 3",
    color    = "grey50"
  )
}

# ---- Helper: png → list of magick images (one per page) -----
png_to_pages <- function(name, folder) {
  path <- file.path(folder, paste0(name, ".png"))
  if (!file.exists(path)) {
    message("Skipping missing file: ", path)
    return(NULL)
  }

  img  <- image_read(path)
  info <- image_info(img)

  if (info$height > content_h) {
    n_pages <- ceiling(info$height / content_h)
    lapply(seq_len(n_pages), function(i) {
      y_start <- (i - 1) * content_h
      h       <- min(content_h, info$height - y_start)
      slice   <- image_crop(img, paste0(info$width, "x", h, "+0+", y_start))
      page    <- image_blank(page_w_px, page_h_px, color = "white")
      image_composite(page, slice, offset = paste0("+", margin_px, "+", margin_px))
    })
  } else {
    page <- image_blank(page_w_px, page_h_px, color = "white")
    page <- image_composite(page, img, offset = paste0("+", margin_px, "+", margin_px))
    list(page)
  }
}

# ---- Build content pages and collect TOC entries ------------
all_items <- list(
  list(files = chart_files, folder = "final_charts"),
  list(files = table_files, folder = "final_tables")
)

content_pages <- list()
toc_entries   <- list()
page_counter  <- n_toc_pages + 1L

for (group in all_items) {
  for (name in group$files) {
    pages <- png_to_pages(name, group$folder)
    if (is.null(pages)) next

    toc_entries[[length(toc_entries) + 1]] <- list(
      name  = name,
      page  = page_counter,
      title = tryCatch(get_meta(name)$title, error = function(e) name)
    )

    content_pages <- c(content_pages, pages)
    page_counter  <- page_counter + length(pages)
  }
}

# ---- Build TOC as ggplot ------------------------------------
toc_df <- data.frame(
  id    = sapply(toc_entries, `[[`, "name"),
  page  = sapply(toc_entries, `[[`, "page"),
  title = sapply(toc_entries, `[[`, "title"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

toc_chunks <- split(toc_df, ceiling(seq_len(nrow(toc_df)) / toc_per_page))

toc_pages <- lapply(seq_along(toc_chunks), function(i) {
  chunk      <- toc_chunks[[i]]
  max_id_len <- max(nchar(chunk$id))

  rows <- mapply(function(id, pg, title) {
    id_pad <- formatC(id,            width = max_id_len, flag = "-")
    pg_str <- formatC(paste0("p.", pg), width = 6,      flag = "-")
    title  <- if (nchar(title) > 60) paste0(substr(title, 1, 57), "...") else title
    paste0(id_pad, "   ", pg_str, "   ", title)
  }, chunk$id, chunk$page, chunk$title)

  heading <- if (i == 1) "Table of Contents" else "Table of Contents (continued)"

  p <- ggplot() +
    annotate("text",
             x = 0.05, y = 0.97,
             label    = heading,
             hjust    = 0, vjust = 1,
             family   = FONT_FAMILY,
             fontface = "bold",
             size     = 7,
             color    = tpa_colors[1]) +
    annotate("segment",
             x = 0.05, xend = 0.95,
             y = 0.955, yend = 0.955,
             color = tpa_colors[1], linewidth = 0.5) +
    annotate("text",
             x = 0.05, y = 0.93,
             label      = paste(rows, collapse = "\n"),
             hjust      = 0, vjust = 1,
             family     = "mono",
             size       = 3.2,
             color      = "grey20",
             lineheight = 1.4) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), expand = c(0, 0)) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), expand = c(0, 0)) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA))

  tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".png")
  ggsave(tmp, p, width = 8.5, height = 11, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
  image_read(tmp)
})

# ---- Stamp page numbers -------------------------------------
toc_pages_numbered <- lapply(seq_along(toc_pages), function(i) {
  stamp_page_number(toc_pages[[i]], i)
})

content_pages_numbered <- lapply(seq_along(content_pages), function(i) {
  stamp_page_number(content_pages[[i]], i + n_toc_pages)
})

# ---- Write single-page PDFs then combine --------------------
dir.create("final_charts/tmp_pages", showWarnings = FALSE)

all_pages <- c(toc_pages_numbered, content_pages_numbered)

pdf_paths <- mapply(function(img, i) {
  path <- file.path("final_charts/tmp_pages", sprintf("page_%04d.pdf", i))
  image_write(img, path = path, format = "pdf", density = 300)
  path
}, all_pages, seq_along(all_pages))

pdftools::pdf_combine(unlist(pdf_paths), output = "report.pdf")

# ---- Clean up -----------------------------------------------
file.remove(unlist(pdf_paths))
unlink("final_charts/tmp_pages", recursive = TRUE)

message("Done — ", length(all_pages), " pages written as report.pdf to the project directory")
```
